description: System contract for regression detection. Two sections: invariants (always-true properties checked before every commit) and surfaces (shared code surfaces mapped to the features that depend on them). When a feature touches a surface, all other features sharing that surface must be re-tested.

invariants.description: ~/.skilldeck/config.json is valid JSON and has required shape
Every deployment record references a project ID that exists in config.json
No IPC channel is registered more than once in electron/main.ts
Every skill displayed in the library view has a corresponding .md file on disk

store.skills.description: Zustand skills store — shape, actions, selectors

store.projects.description: Zustand projects store — shape, actions, selectors

ipc.skills.description: IPC handlers for skill operations in electron/ipc/skills.ts

ipc.projects.description: IPC handlers for project operations in electron/ipc/projects.ts

preload.description: Electron contextBridge preload — exposes IPC to renderer

app.entry.description: Electron main entry point and app initialization

discovery.scanner.description: Machine skill scanner — reads from multiple tool directories

discovery.sync.description: Cross-tool sync — writes to multiple tool directories

embeddings.description: Local embedding engine — Transformers.js all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for semantic search

target.profiles.description: Target profile system — deployment format definitions and write logic per tool

config.json.description: ~/.skilldeck/config.json — F025 changes project schema from skillsPath to targetProfile, F028 adds deploymentStrategy

versions.description: ~/.skilldeck/versions/ — per-skill version snapshot storage for F029

git.sync.description: Git CLI integration for library sync across machines
